Grid.description: Experimental two-dimensional layout container. This is not an official A2UI v0.8 base component and is lowered by each channel renderer.

cellSize.description: Target square cell size in pixels.

gap.description: Target spacing between cells in pixels.

backgroundColor.description: Fallback CSS color used when a cell value is missing.

children.description: Optional static list of child component ids. Children are placed row-major into cells.

cellBackgrounds.description: Optional bound value resolving to a dense rows by cols matrix of CSS color strings. This is a pixel-display convenience, not the core Grid model.
